basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Manager/ Sr. Project Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Project Manager / Sr. Project Assistant (Admin.) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Delhi. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Delhi Project Manager / Sr. Project Assistant (Admin.) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree preferably MCA with at least 55% marks, Post Graduate Degree with 55% marks
qualification.details: Project Manager: Master's Degree preferably MCA with at least 55% marks from a government recognized institute/university. Minimum 12 years of experience in office management at educational institute out of which at least 5 years at the level of Senior Assistant. Proficiency in various tools for office admin including MS-Office, EOffice, ERP, Systems etc., Web site, experience of admission procedure at the institute, organizing meeting, events, office file record, etc. Sr. Project Assistant (Admin.): Post Graduate Degree with 55% marks and 12 years of work experience with at least 5 years experience in the actual conduct of meetings/examinations and/or adequate experience of supervisory work at Jr. Superintendent level in a Govt. office or in an educational institution. Should know of Office Procedures, rules & regulations generally operative in Govt. office or in Educational Institutions, including experience in Store & Purchase procurement through GEM, Tender, etc.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_delhi: Master's Degree preferably MCA with at least 55% marks, Post Graduate Degree with 55% marks

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Manager: Master's Degree preferably MCA with at least 55% marks from a government recognized institute/university. Minimum 12 years of experience in office management at educational institute out of which at least 5 years at the level of Senior Assistant. Proficiency in various tools for office admin including MS-Office, EOffice, ERP, Systems etc., Web site, experience of admission procedure at the institute, organizing meeting, events, office file record, etc. Sr. Project Assistant (Admin.): Post Graduate Degree with 55% marks and 12 years of work experience with at least 5 years experience in the actual conduct of meetings/examinations and/or adequate experience of supervisory work at Jr. Superintendent level in a Govt. office or in an educational institution. Should know of Office Procedures, rules & regulations generally operative in Govt. office or in Educational Institutions, including experience in Store & Purchase procurement through GEM, Tender, etc.

rows.event: Last Date for Submitting Applications by Email

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for Project Manager / Sr. Project Assistant (Admin.) posts in IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026. This offers a good opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for IIT Delhi Project Manager posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications via email for the IIT Delhi Project Manager / Sr. Project Assistant (Admin.) posts is 03 August 2026. Candidates should ensure their applications reach before this deadline.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IIT Delhi Recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 through email. Detailed instructions on how to prepare and send the application are provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the qualifications required for Project Manager post?
faq.answer: For the Project Manager post, a Master's Degree preferably MCA with at least 55% marks from a recognized institute/university and 12 years of relevant experience is required.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 involves two main stages: initial shortlisting of applications, followed by an online interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Delhi Project Manager / Sr. Project Assistant (Admin.) posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category, including General/OBC and SC/ST, for the IIT Delhi Project Manager / Sr. Project Assistant (Admin.) posts. Applications are free.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job location for these posts?
faq.answer: The job location for these Project Manager / Sr. Project Assistant (Admin.) posts is New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110016. It's a central location.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website for IIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for IIT Delhi recruitment, where candidates can find more details and updates, is http://ird.iitd.ac.in. It's the primary source of information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary for Sr. Project Assistant (Admin.)?
faq.answer: The salary for Sr. Project Assistant (Admin.) is Rs. 47790 - 62350/- per month, along with an additional HRA @30%. This offers a competitive remuneration package.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this opportunity at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: This is a Contractual government job opportunity at the Indian Institute of Technology Delhi. It provides a chance to work in a prestigious educational institution on a contract basis.
